allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; models=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('models',[]\); [print\(m['name'], '-', m.get\('supportedGenerationMethods',''\)\) for m in models if 'generateContent' in m.get\('supportedGenerationMethods',[]\)]")

Bash(curl -s -X POST 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1/models/gemini-2.5-flash:generateContent?key=AIzaSyDJHbsv6DkS6K7cFALwJ4VlN_b2_a-vpj8' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"contents":[{"parts":[{"text":"Return only this exact JSON, no other text: {\\"test\\": true}"}]}],"generationConfig":{"maxOutputTokens":100,"temperature":0}}')
